result.summary: Created mobile UX components: useSwipe hook for swipe gestures, FloatingActionButton with expandable radial menu (add task, search, AI), MobileBottomNav with Hafta/Takım/AI/Notlar tabs. Safe area inset support for notch devices. All type-safe with zero build errors.
